ResearchTabDef.label: Segmentum
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock new technologies from the various factions of the Segmentum series by researching at a research bench.

ResearchProjectDef.label: plasma induction
ResearchProjectDef.description: Be granted the consecrated rites of plasma induction, allowing the containment and manipulation of extreme thermal energies for use in weapon systems, power generation, and advanced industrial applications.
